title: ASCII Image Viewer

controls.caption: Previous
Next

code:
image_files = []
current_index = 0

def on_load_frmMain():
    global image_files, current_index
    image_files = []
    current_index = 0
    
    # Load sample ASCII art
    load_sample_images()
    lblTitle.caption = 'Sample Images Loaded'
    update_image_info()

def load_sample_images():
    # Sample ASCII art definitions
    smiley = '''
  ██████  
 ██  █ ██ 
 █ ████ █ 
 ██  █ ██ 
  ██████  
'''
    
    heart = '''
 ██   ██  
████ ████ 
██████████
 ███████  
  █████   
   ███    
    █     
'''
    
    star = '''
    █    
   ███   
  █████  
█████████
  █████  
 ███████ 
█████████
'''
    
    computer = '''
  ████████
  █      █
  ████████
     ██   
  ████████
  █      █
  ████████
'''
    
    # Create image list
    picDisplay.image_list = ImageList()
    
    # Add sample images
    for name, art in [('Smiley', smiley), ('Heart', heart), ('Star', star), ('Computer', computer)]:
        img = ASCIIImage()
        lines = art.strip('\n').split('\n')
        img.pixels = [list(line) for line in lines]
        img.height = len(img.pixels)
        img.width = max(len(line) for line in img.pixels) if img.pixels else 0
        # Pad lines
        for row in img.pixels:
            while len(row) < img.width:
                row.append(' ')
        picDisplay.image_list.add_image(img)
    
    # Display first image
    if picDisplay.image_list.images:
        picDisplay.set_image(picDisplay.image_list.get_current())

def update_image_info():
    if picDisplay.image and picDisplay.image_list:
        lblSize.caption = f'Size: {picDisplay.image.width} x {picDisplay.image.height}'
        current = picDisplay.image_list.current_index + 1
        total = len(picDisplay.image_list.images)
        lblIndex.caption = f'Image: {current} / {total}'
    else:
        lblSize.caption = 'Size: -- x --'
        lblIndex.caption = 'Image: 0 / 0'

def on_menu_mnuOpen():
    global image_files, current_index
    filename = file_dialog('open', ['.txt', '.xpm', '*'])
    if not filename:
        return
    
    img = ASCIIImage()
    if img.load_from_file(filename):
        # Create new image list with single image
        picDisplay.image_list = ImageList()
        picDisplay.image_list.add_image(img)
        picDisplay.set_image(img)
        lblFile.caption = 'Image: ' + filename[-20:] if len(filename) > 20 else 'Image: ' + filename
        update_image_info()
        msgbox('Image loaded successfully!', 'Open')
    else:
        msgbox('Failed to load image!', 'Error')

def on_menu_mnuNext():
    if picDisplay.image_list and len(picDisplay.image_list.images) > 0:
        picDisplay.image_list.next_frame()
        picDisplay.set_image(picDisplay.image_list.get_current())
        update_image_info()

def on_menu_mnuPrev():
    if picDisplay.image_list and len(picDisplay.image_list.images) > 0:
        picDisplay.image_list.prev_frame()
        picDisplay.set_image(picDisplay.image_list.get_current())
        update_image_info()
